mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.create_time AS createTime, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.name ORDER BY r.id SEPARATOR '，'), '未分配角色') AS roleName FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.create_time, u.update_time
